title: petalonyx thurberi subsp. thurberi
intro: Petalonyx thurberi subsp. thurberi, also known as Thurber's catclaw or Thurber's petalonyx, is a perennial shrub in the family Rhamnaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Petalonyx thurberi subsp. thurberi include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of certain infections. Herbal preparations of Petalonyx thurberi subsp. thurberi can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
